feed.subtitle: Latest gigs and events in Oslo, Norway
feed.title: Oslo Gig Guide

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-04-02 14:00
Tags: Deathmetal, Metal, Inferno


Voidspire dwells in the catacombs of Oslo to create cavernous, engulfing death metal. With members from other bands like: Horrifier, Ruun, Blodkarsk and Celestial Scourge their sound is malicious and full of agony and grief. Prepare to experience a vicious and thunderous atmosphere. Their upcoming EP is set to be released later in 2025.

Free Entry with Festival Pass 250 Nok Door with no pass

  1. yo


Tickets:
entry.summary: Brewgata x Inferno Matinee // VOIDSPIRE Live at Brewgata on 2026-04-02 14:00
entry.title: Brewgata x Inferno Matinee // VOIDSPIRE Live (2026-04-02)

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-04-02 15:00
Tags: Metal, Inferno


Homselvareg emerged in 2004 in northern Italy, inspired by the legend of the Homo Salvadego, a mythological figure from the Alps. In 2005, they self-produced their first eponymous album in limited quantities. Despite minimal promotion, it received positive feedback, leading to an official reissue.

From 2004 to 2010, they mainly performed in Italy, sharing the stage with notable black metal acts like Shining, The Stone, Otargos, and Kult. In 2010, they released their second album, "Catastrofe," which garnered positive reviews in magazines like Legacy, Terrorizer, and Grind Zone. After this release, the band unfortunately disbanded.

In 2015, Homselvareg reformed with a partially renewed lineup, including Gerion (Tumulus Anmatus). In 2018, they released the EP "Rinascita," and in 2023, the full-length album "Ventunesimo Secolo," featuring new guitarist Vestigian (Vltor, Furor Gallico) and session drummer Jonathan Garofoli (Naer Mataron, Lost Soul, Azrath-11).

Since 2015, the band has performed with acts like Impaled Nazarene, Mysticum, Sargeist, Sur Austru, Ad Hominem, and Nocturnal Depression.

On November 23, 2024, to celebrate their twentieth anniversary, the band released a box set of tape reissues of their first four works with renewed artwork. The set is wrapped in hand-tattooed real leather and is limited to 30 copies. The release date coincided with their first live performance with the new lineup at the Stige Fest, supporting Mysticum and Cult Of Fire. Also in November, the band released a new single titled 𝑺𝒑𝒊𝒓𝒊𝒕𝒐 𝑬𝒓𝒓𝒂𝒏𝒕𝒆 𝑬𝒕𝒆𝒓𝒏𝒐 featuring new bassist Clod the Ripper (Blasphemer, Nel Buio) and Vellacifer as session drummer (Electrocution, Blasphemer, Nel Buio), now replaced by new permanent drummer Ferox.

Free Entry with Festival Pass 250Nok door for non Festival

  1. yo


Tickets:
entry.summary: Brewgata x Inferno Matinée // HOMESELVAREG Live at Brewgata on 2026-04-02 15:00
entry.title: Brewgata x Inferno Matinée // HOMESELVAREG Live (2026-04-02)

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-04-02 23:30
Tags: Inferno, Afterparty, Metal


Hailing from Norway and now based in Copenhagen, Denmark, Johannes Thor Sandal is a genre-bending force in the Nordic music scene. Johannes Thor is best known as the former drummer and vocalist of the doom metal duo Golden Core (2014–2025), with over 150 electrifying performances at festivals and clubs alike, across Norway, Denmark, Iceland, and the UK, such as Øyafestivalen, ByLarm, Midgardsblot, Høstsabbat and Bloodstock.

Today, Johannes Thor is a freelance musician and DJ, as well as the founder of Helvetes Indre Kretser — a creative force in music and performance.


Tickets:
entry.summary: Inferno Afterparty // Dj Johannes Thor (Helvetes Indre Kretser) at Brewgata on 2026-04-02 23:30
entry.title: Inferno Afterparty // Dj Johannes Thor (Helvetes Indre Kretser) (2026-04-02)

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-04-03 14:00
Tags: Inferno, Doom, Metal


Cavern Deep is a slow, heavy band, founded 2019, by members from Zonaria and Swedish retro riffsters Gudars Skymning. The band released its first self-titled concept album through Interstellar Smoke Records and then went on to form their own record label called Bonebag Records, releasing their second album "Part II - Breach" to critical acclaim.

Their latest album “Part III - The Bodiless” is set to release the 9th of May 2025. It is the final entry in the concept album trilogy started with their debut album released in 2021.

Free Entry with Festival Pass 250 nok Door for non festival

  1. yo


Tickets:
entry.summary: Brewgata x Inferno Matinée // CAVERN DEEP Live at Brewgata on 2026-04-03 14:00
entry.title: Brewgata x Inferno Matinée // CAVERN DEEP Live (2026-04-03)

Venue: Brewgata

Tags: Doom, Metal, Inferno


Cavern Deep is a slow, heavy band, founded 2019, by members from Zonaria and Swedish retro riffsters Gudars Skymning. The band released its first self-titled concept album through Interstellar Smoke Records and then went on to form their own record label called Bonebag Records, releasing their second album "Part II - Breach" to critical acclaim.

Their latest album “Part III - The Bodiless” is set to release the 9th of May 2025. It is the final entry in the concept album trilogy started with their debut album released in 2021.

Free Entry with Festival Pass 250 nok Door for non festival

Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-04-03 23:30
Tags: Inferno, Afterparty, Metal


Anders Odden celebrates 40 years of extreme metal with his old school DJ set at Brewgata

entry.summary: Inferno Afterparty // Anders Odden Dj set at Brewgata on 2026-04-03 23:30
entry.title: Inferno Afterparty // Anders Odden Dj set (2026-04-03)

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-04-04 15:00
Tags: Inferno, Metal, Blackmetal


Hevn III stiger frem fra skyggene i Norges undergrunn med et debutalbum som kun kan beskrives som et sonisk angrep. Denne nådeløse black metal-utgivelsen er et vitnesbyrd om ren forakt for mennesket og dens tilstand, kanalisert gjennom rå, primitiv aggresjon. Med inspirasjon fra mørk magi, drømmer og betraktningene til William Blake, Nietzsche og Crowley, skaper Hevn III et lydlandskap som både er kaotisk og dypt urovekkende.

For de som har opplevd Hevn III live, er intensiteten i deres opptreden uforglemmelig. Lydbildet peker mot støyrockens estetikk, og refererer til den tid da black metal var kaotisk, dissonant og ufiltrert, preget av en stram, svovelaktig støy som gnager hull i sjelen.

Free Entry with Festival Pass 250 Nok door for non Festival 20. yo


Tickets:
entry.summary: Brewgata x Inferno Matinèe // HEVN III Live at Brewgata on 2026-04-04 15:00
entry.title: Brewgata x Inferno Matinèe // HEVN III Live (2026-04-04)

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-04-04 23:30
Tags: Inferno, Bizarrekult, Metal


Long time friend Roman from Bizarrekult will take control of the tunes after his performance at Inferno Festival.

Find Bizarrekult new album “Alt Som Finnes” here:

https://orcd.co/bizarrekultaltsomfinnes

entry.content:
Venue: Brewgata
Start: 2026-04-05 15:00
Tags: Inferno, metal


Blodknoke finner du dypt nede i svartpønken – i skjæringspunktet mellom Burzum og Buzzcocks! De synger om livet akkurat som Jokke, og dreper deg med glimt i øyet, akkurat som Snoop Dogg! Nekro Snoop... Nekro Jokke... Blodknoke!

Free Entry with Festival Pass 250 Nok Door for non Festival 20. yo


Tickets:
entry.summary: Brewgata x Inferno Matinée // BLODKNOKE Live at Brewgata on 2026-04-05 15:00
entry.title: Brewgata x Inferno Matinée // BLODKNOKE Live (2026-04-05)

entry.content:
Venue: BLÅ
Start: 2026-05-02 23:00
Tags: house, trance, techno


Gundelach er kjent for sin evne til å blande tilsynelatende motstridende musikalske stiler til noe bemerkelsesverdig. Ved å skape en flytende overgang mellom klubbmusikk, ambient musikk og country, tilfører han en rikdom og dybde til musikkbildet som gjør hans konserter både spesielle og minneverdige. Med en sterk bakgrunn i elektronisk musikk og en eksperimentell tilnærming, skaper han opplevelser som sømløst forener musikksjangre, og gir publikum en unik musikalsk reise gjennom «Spiralling»


Tickets: www.ticketmaster.no
entry.title: Gundelach (DJ) (2026-05-02)

entry.content:
Venue: Rockefeller
Start: 2026-11-30 19:00
Tags: alternativepop, darkwave


Den britiske singer-songwriteren og produsenten Artemas kommer til Oslo og Rockefeller 30. november! Han har på kort tid etablert seg som en av de mest spennende nye stemmene innen alternativ pop. Artemas er kjent for sine elektriske konserter og har en dypt engasjert fanbase.

Nå annonserer darkwave-artisten sin etterlengtede verdensturné, med 38 konserter – hans største livesatsing til nå. Etter utgivelsen av den nye mixtapen getting up to no good, tar Artemas med seg sin mørke, avhengighetsskapende og oppslukende verden ut til fansen, med Henry Morris som support.

Artemas har så langt samlet over 3.6 milliarder streams, inkludert mer enn 2 milliarder streams på gjennombruddshiten «i like the way you kiss me». Med getting up to no good som et nytt kreativt høydepunkt, er den kommende turneen klar til å bringe hans mørke, sensuelle alt-pop-univers ut til et større publikum enn noen gang før.

--

Bill. kr. 360,- + bill.avg.

18 års aldersgrense med legitimasjonsplikt. Ingen vergeordning. Gyldig legitimasjon er fysisk nasjonalt ID-kort, pass, fysisk førerkort eller bankkort med bilde. Digital legitimasjon (digitalt førerkort eller Bank-ID) eller bilde av legitimasjon er ikke gyldig legitimasjon.

Arrangementet har ståplasser.

Dørene åpner kl. 19.00. Arrangementet starter ca. 1 time etter dørene åpner. NB! Det anbefales å komme i god tid før arrangementet starter da det kan bli kø.


Tickets: www.ticketmaster.no
entry.title: Artemas (2026-11-30)
